idVerification.title: ID Verification
idVerification.uploadPrompt: Upload your national ID to enable rental services.
idVerification.pendingDesc: Your ID is being reviewed by our team. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
idVerification.verifiedDesc: Your identity has been verified. You can now rent items.
idVerification.rejectedDesc: Your ID verification was rejected. Please upload clear images and try again.
idVerification.whyNeededDesc: For the safety of our rental items and customers, we require identity verification before processing any rental orders.
idVerification.requirement1: Required only once — subsequent rentals skip this step
idVerification.requirement2: Your data is encrypted and stored securely
idVerification.requirement4: Accepted: National ID (NIDA), Passport, Driver's License
idVerification.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
idVerification.allSetDesc: Your identity has been verified. You can now browse and rent designer gowns and formal wear.
idVerification.underReviewDesc: Our team is reviewing your ID. You'll receive a notification once the verification is complete. This usually takes 1-2 business days.

pages.pageNotFound: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
pages.aboutWhoWeAreContent: Naro Fashion is Tanzania's premier online fashion destination, offering a curated selection of clothing, accessories, and designer gowns for purchase and rental. Founded with a passion for making premium fashion accessible to every Tanzanian, we bring the latest trends from around the world right to your doorstep.
pages.aboutMissionContent: To make premium fashion accessible and affordable for every Tanzanian. We believe that looking your best shouldn't come at an unreasonable cost, which is why we offer competitive prices and our unique gown rental service for special occasions.
pages.aboutVisionContent: To become East Africa's leading fashion e-commerce platform, known for quality, affordability, and exceptional customer service. We envision a future where every person can express their unique style without compromise.
pages.contactAddressValue:
Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
Kinondoni District, Mikocheni Area
pages.faqShippingContent: We deliver across Tanzania. Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days, while express delivery takes 1-2 business days. Free shipping is available on orders over TZS 100,000. You can track your order status from your account dashboard.
pages.faqReturnsContent: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for unused items in their original packaging. To initiate a return, contact our support team or visit your order history. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.
pages.faqPaymentContent: We accept Mobile Money (M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money), Visa/Mastercard, bank transfers, and Cash on Delivery. All online payments are processed securely through our payment partners.
pages.faqRentalsContent: To rent a gown, you need to verify your national ID (one-time process). Select your dates, pay a 25% down payment to reserve, and complete the full payment before pickup. A damage deposit is required and will be refunded after the item is returned in good condition.
pages.faqAccountContent: You can create an account using your email or sign in with Google/Facebook. We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information. You can update your profile, manage addresses, and track orders from your account dashboard.
pages.termsGeneralContent: By using Naro Fashion's website and services, you agree to these terms of service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
pages.termsOrdersContent: All orders are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices are listed in Tanzanian Shillings (TZS) and may change without notice. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders at our discretion.
pages.termsRentalsContent: Rental items must be returned by the agreed return date. Late returns incur a daily fee. Customers are responsible for any damage beyond normal wear. A damage deposit is required and may be partially or fully withheld based on the item's condition upon return. National ID verification is mandatory for all rental transactions.
pages.termsPaymentsContent: Payments must be made through our approved payment methods. Refunds for purchases are processed within 5-10 business days. Rental down payments are non-refundable if cancelled within 48 hours of the rental start date. Damage deposits are refunded after successful inspection of returned items.
pages.privacyCollectionContent: We collect information you provide when creating an account, placing orders, or contacting us. This includes your name, email, phone number, shipping addresses, and payment information. For rental services, we also collect national ID images for verification purposes.
pages.privacyUsageContent: Your information is used to process orders, manage rentals, communicate about your transactions, improve our services, and send promotional offers (with your consent). We never sell your personal information to third parties.
pages.privacySharingContent: We share your information only with trusted partners necessary for service delivery: payment processors, shipping providers, and cloud service providers. All partners are bound by data protection agreements.
pages.privacySecurityContent: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and access controls to protect your personal data. National ID images are encrypted at rest and access is restricted to authorized personnel only.
pages.sizeGuideHowContent:
For the best fit, take your measurements while wearing lightweight clothing. Use a flexible tape measure and keep it snug but not tight.

• Bust: Measure around the fullest part of your chest
• Waist: Measure around your natural waistline
• Hips: Measure around the fullest part of your hips
• Length: Measure from shoulder to desired hemline
pages.sizeGuideWomenContent:
XS (UK 6): Bust 80cm, Waist 60cm, Hips 86cm
S (UK 8-10): Bust 84-88cm, Waist 64-68cm, Hips 90-94cm
M (UK 12): Bust 92cm, Waist 72cm, Hips 98cm
L (UK 14): Bust 96cm, Waist 76cm, Hips 102cm
XL (UK 16): Bust 100cm, Waist 80cm, Hips 106cm
2XL (UK 18): Bust 106cm, Waist 86cm, Hips 112cm
pages.sizeGuideMenContent:
S (UK 36): Chest 91cm, Waist 76cm
M (UK 38-40): Chest 96-101cm, Waist 81-86cm
L (UK 42): Chest 106cm, Waist 91cm
XL (UK 44): Chest 111cm, Waist 96cm
2XL (UK 46): Chest 116cm, Waist 102cm
pages.shippingZonesContent:
Zone 1 — Dar es Salaam: Standard delivery TZS 3,000, Express TZS 8,000
Zone 2 — Major cities (Arusha, Mwanza, Dodoma, Mbeya): Standard TZS 7,000, Express TZS 15,000
Zone 3 — Other regions: Standard TZS 10,000, Express TZS 20,000

Free standard shipping on orders over TZS 100,000.
pages.shippingTimesContent:
Standard Delivery: 5-7 business days
Express Delivery: 1-2 business days
Pickup Point: Ready within 24 hours

Delivery times are estimates and may vary depending on location and availability.
pages.shippingTrackingContent: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive an SMS and email with tracking information. You can also track your order status from your account dashboard under 'My Orders'.
pages.returnsPolicyContent: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for items that are unused, unworn, and in their original packaging with all tags attached. Sale items and intimate apparel are final sale and cannot be returned.
pages.returnsProcessContent:
1. Log in to your account and go to 'My Orders'
2. Select the order and item you wish to return
3. Choose your reason for return
4. Our team will review and approve your request within 24 hours
5. Ship the item back or schedule a pickup
6. Refund will be processed within 5-10 business days after inspection
pages.returnsExclusionsContent:
The following items cannot be returned:
• Intimate apparel and swimwear
• Items marked as 'Final Sale'
• Customized or altered items
• Items without original tags and packaging
• Rental items (subject to separate rental terms)
